{{Quote|If the Rebels are aware of this phenomenon, they'll try to destroy Golrath Station—and my chances of ''promotion'' along with it!|[[Mils Giel]], to [[Malka]]|<ref name="SW65" />}}
The '''raid on Golrath Station''' was a battle between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] for control of a former Rebel base, [[Golrath Station]].

==Background==
After the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] abandoned their base on an abandoned [[Magma/Legends|magma]] smelting plant on [[Golrath/Legends|Golrath]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] took control of the facility known as [[Golrath Station]]. It was later discovered by the Alliance that the bedrock that comprised the station's foundations harbored several strange characteristics. When heated, the mineral compounds absorbed ambient light rays, but when it cooled, it released those rays, playing them back in the form of a [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]]. Fearing these images could reveal Alliance secrets to the Empire, [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] ordered an immediate assault on Golrath and the destruction of the former Rebel base.<ref name="SW65" />

Recently demoted Imperial [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Mils Giel]] discovered the rock's properties while leading a small group guarding the base and ordered a contingent of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] to defend Golrath Station if the Rebels returned.<ref name="SW65" />

==The battle==
Two [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] led by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Hanc Thorben]], and composed of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]], launched from [[Haven Base]] on [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]]. Among the fighters was Princess Leia piloting a Y-wing. Upon arriving at Golrath, the Rebel fighters engaged the TIE fighters in battle above the surface, hoping to draw them northward, away from the station to allow for an infiltrator to enter the facility and destroy it.<ref name="SW65" />

As the TIEs were drawn away, Princess Leia exited her craft in midair, flying to the surface with a [[parabelt]], and entered the base. She headed for the [[Reactor/Legends|reactor]] core, making her way past [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and coming face to face with Lieutenant Giel. Considering the Princess' [[Death/Legends|death]] more valuable to the Empire than the information Golrath Station may have held, Giel set the base's reactor to overload. His ploy failed when Leia made her escape and was picked up by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian's]] Y-wing flying past the facility.<ref name="SW65" />

The overload of the reactor was irreversible and Giel was forced to flee, but not before angrily firing at a passing X-wing with his [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]]. Golrath Station was destroyed and the remaining Rebel fighters escaped.<ref name="SW65" />

==Aftermath==
Giel's stray blaster shot made contact with the [[Engine/Legends|engines]] of Luke Skywalker's X-wing fighter, causing enough damage to prevent Skywalker from escaping into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] with the rest of the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]. He eventually escaped the Imperial fighters and was forced to land on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Beheboth]] before finally returning to [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]].<ref name="SW66" /><ref name="SW67">[[Star Wars (1977) 67|''Star Wars'' (1977) 67]]</ref> Unknown to the Rebels at the time, Giel's [[Imperial troop transport|vessel]] also sustained damage during the battle, forcing him down on Beheboth where he would be stranded for the next [[8 ABY/Legends|five]] [[Standard year/Legends|years]].<ref name="Beheboth" />
